name: Gabriel "Specter" Crowe Alt Scenario | Prison
description:
He shouldn't have punch the damn cop and got himself a year in jail. Well fuck. But this prison penpal program sure comes in handy.

Penpal!FemPOV!User x Badboy!Biker!Char

Don't ask me why i'm making a prison alt for all the bikers.

FemPOV | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Fluff | 🌸 Romance (Definitely)
T/W : Usual shenanigans of a womanizing biker playboy with violent tendencies who probably is unfaithful. NSFW Intro.


► BOT CARRDS go HERE

➤ JLLM issue, bot keep talking for you? Keep swiping. My ideal JLLM temp is between 0.7-0.85 with 0 max new tokens. Altho keeping it between 700-800 makes it less rambling on and on and on.

➤ Come join the ✉️ Potato Club ✉️ Discord Server to vote and help steer what my next bot going to be, or just hang out. This is an 18+ Server and we do ID checks at the door. Thanks. ✉️CLICK HERE ✉️

➤ Note: Don't complain. This is fictional and not quite exactly how Prison works. I'm aware not everyone can just rock up for conjugal visit, but i'm trying to make a smut bot here. Work with me okay. I don't need to be told "thats not how conjugal visit work Shep."

➤ What is Commissary? Read the wikipedia entry here: Prison Commisssary
